mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_community_post_id.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO community_posts ( community_post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{communityPostId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT cp.community_post_id, cp.user_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.category, cp.view_count, cp.created_at, cp.updated_at, u.nickname, img.image_url AS main_image_url FROM community_posts cp JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post_img img ON cp.community_post_id = img.community_post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' WHERE cp.community_post_id = #{communityPostId}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId}
mapper.select: SELECT cp.community_post_id, cp.user_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.category, cp.view_count, cp.created_at, cp.updated_at, u.nickname, img.image_url AS main_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post_likes l WHERE l.community_post_id = cp.community_post_id) AS like_count FROM community_posts cp JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post_img img ON cp.community_post_id = img.community_post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY cp.created_at DESC

SELECT cp.community_post_id, cp.user_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.category, cp.view_count, cp.created_at, cp.updated_at, u.nickname, img.image_url AS main_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post_likes l WHERE l.community_post_id = cp.community_post_id) AS like_count FROM community_posts cp JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post_img img ON cp.community_post_id = img.community_post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y'
cp.category = #{category}
ORDER BY
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post_likes l WHERE l.community_post_id = cp.community_post_id) DESC
cp.view_count DESC
cp.created_at DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
